chapter_goal: Explain how a moving complex manifold has locally constant topology but varying complex and Hodge data.
checks: parallel transport matrix preserves a toy intersection form
Kodaira-Spencer map lands in the expected Hom space
lab: Move along two paths in a punctured base and compare flat transport with the changing Hodge filtration.
library_routes: Plotly HTML for a small period-path preview
pitfalls: thinking all nearby fibers are holomorphically isomorphic
confusing the Gauss-Manin connection with a metric connection
turning upper semicontinuity into equality without extra input
proof_moves: separate topological local constancy from holomorphic variation
differentiate transition data to obtain Kodaira-Spencer classes
transport cohomology with a flat connection
visual_focus: A base disk with fibers and tangent arrows distinguishes flat transport from Kodaira-Spencer variation.
